summary.headline: Scenegraph diagnostics found missing or misplaced nodes.
summary.outcome: The capture succeeded, but one or more required nodes were missing or attached under the wrong branch.
keyFindings: missing_node: The Ball gameplay node must exist under the Main root.

notes: The manifest is intended to be the first file an agent reads before opening raw scenegraph artifacts.
